column1: I want to walk in the park ... is near the river.
I sent a letter ...  arrived four weeks later.
Poppy visited the art gallery ... her friend recommended.
She saw animals ... lived in the cages.
Mary liked the new armchair ... was very cozy.
This is the man ... stole the car.
They are the superheroes ... saved the city.
I don’t like the clown ... has a blue nose.
They went to their daughter ... lives in New Zealand.
